description: Qualification & Currency Tracker — tracks pilot qualifications, type ratings, check ride currency, instrument proficiency, and line checks

hard_stops.label: PIC Proficiency Check Expired
hard_stops.logic: Pilot's 135.293 competency/proficiency check is overdue — cannot serve as PIC under Part 135

hard_stops.label: Instrument Currency Lapsed
hard_stops.logic: Pilot's instrument currency has lapsed per 14 CFR 61.57(c) — cannot file or fly IFR

hard_stops.label: Line Check Overdue
hard_stops.logic: Pilot's line check is overdue per 14 CFR 135.299 — cannot serve as PIC under Part 135

hard_stops.label: Type Rating Not Held
hard_stops.logic: Pilot is assigned to an aircraft type for which they do not hold a type rating

soft_flags.label: Proficiency Check Due Within 30 Days
soft_flags.logic: Pilot's proficiency check expires within 30 days — schedule check ride

soft_flags.label: Instrument Currency Expiring Soon
soft_flags.logic: Pilot's instrument currency expires within 30 days — needs approaches or IPC

soft_flags.label: Line Check Approaching
soft_flags.logic: Pilot's line check due within 60 days per 135.299
